description: Sterile-fly dispersal flight tracks. Each coord triple: [lat, lon, alt_ft]. alt may be null for points without recorded altitude. dropNote (optional) is a human-entered hint about the drop-zone band; format is free-form (altitude ranges, timestamps, qualitative descriptions).
